event: Portrait of Saint Bernardine of Siena
symbols: golden halo — sanctity and divine favor
hooded gray Franciscan habit — poverty, simplicity, and the Observant Franciscan reform
book held to chest — preaching of the Gospel and devotion to the Holy Name of Jesus
gaunt, ascetic face — the rigorous penitential life of the Franciscan reform movement
profile view — the timeless iconographic tradition of depicting saints in profile
description: A profile portrait of an elderly monk shown from the left side against a dark background. He wears a gray hooded Franciscan habit pulled up over his head, and has a thin, gaunt face with prominent cheekbones and a long nose. His eyes are downcast in a contemplative expression. He holds a small dark book against his chest. A large golden-orange halo radiates behind his head. The painting has a severe, austere quality with sharp, precise drawing characteristic of Mantegna's style.
